articles.title: US-Iran peace talks to begin at Swiss resort with Hormuz, Lebanon conflict in spotlight
articles.description: Certain developments, including Israeli strikes in Lebanon, could complicate talks meant to advance an interim US-Iran deal to end their war.

articles.title: India’s first Polar & Ocean Museum to come up at NCPOR campus in Goa
articles.description: India is set to unveil its first Polar & Ocean Museum in Goa, a collaborative effort between Creative Museum Designers and the National Centre for Polar and Ocean Research. This state-of-the-art facility will showcase India's polar and ocean research through immersive, interactive exhibits, utilizing advanced technologies like VR and AR. The museum aims to educate the public on critical scientific expeditions and the significance of these extreme environments.

articles.title: Jaipur: Notorious burglar Satpal Fauji, associate arrested for theft
articles.description: Jaipur Police arrested notorious history-sheeter Satpal Fauji and an associate for daytime burglaries. Fauji, with 66 prior cases, ran an interstate gang and used silicone masks and wigs to avoid being identified by police.

articles.title: NEET-UG 2026 re-exam: Candidates arrive amid tight security in K'taka
articles.description: Candidates arrived at centres in Davanagere, Karnataka, for the NEET-UG 2026 re-examination amid tight police security. A total of 7,395 candidates are set to appear for the exam across 13 centres in the district on Sunday.

articles.title: NEET-UG 2026 re-exam begins in Thoothukudi amid tight security
articles.description: The NEET-UG 2026 re-examination began in Thoothukudi on Sunday with extensive security measures, including biometric verification and jammers. The NTA is conducting the exam for over 22.79 lakh candidates across India and abroad.

articles.title: NEET-UG 2026 Re-exam: Tight security in Gujarat, Chandigarh, UP
articles.description: Elaborate security arrangements, including police personnel and surveillance teams, have been deployed in Gujarat, Chandigarh, and Uttar Pradesh for the NEET-UG 2026 re-examination to ensure its smooth and fair conduct on Sunday.

articles.title: NEET-2026 re-exam: State-level NTA control room activated in Dehradun
articles.description: Uttarakhand Police activated a state-level NTA control room in Dehradun to ensure the fair and transparent conduct of the NEET-2026 re-examination. Strict security measures are in place for over 6,000 candidates appearing at 16 centres.

articles.title: NEET-UG Re-exam: Parent urges better management to reduce stress
articles.description: In Visakhapatnam, a parent of a NEET-UG re-exam candidate urged the government for better exam management, citing recurring issues causing stress and financial strain on students and families. He appealed for corrective measures to prevent future problems.

articles.title: NEET-UG row: Nagpur student gets Abu Dhabi centre, NTA re-allots
articles.description: A Nagpur-based NEET-UG re-exam candidate was allotted a centre in Abu Dhabi, prompting an outcry. The NTA swiftly re-allotted a centre in Nagpur but later stated that their records show the student had chosen Abu Dhabi during the correction window.

articles.title: Ram temple donations: VHP calls for probe, harshest punishment
articles.description: VHP's Alok Kumar has called for a thorough SIT probe into the alleged irregularities in Ram temple donations, demanding the harshest punishment for anyone found guilty. He said the probe's outcome should be awaited without maligning everyone.

articles.title: Gladiator II Fell Short Because It Lacked Original Film’s Emotional Backbone, Says Russell Crowe
articles.description: A legacy blockbuster sparks debate as its creator questions what went wrong with the sequel.

articles.title: Haryana government to introduce yoga in class 6 from this session, extend to classes 3-9 next session; to be included in HSSC, HPSC exams
articles.description: The Haryana Government on Saturday announced a major expansion of yoga education across schools, universities, and recruitment examinations in the state, stating that yoga will be introduced in the curriculum for Class 6 in the current academic session 2026-27 and extended to all classes from Class 3 to Class 9 in the upcoming academic year.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi scripts history, hits fastest fifty in List A cricket
articles.description: Indian prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi achieved a historic feat in the Tri-Nation Series final, smashing the fastest fifty in List A cricket history. The 15-year-old opener blazed to his half-century in a mere 11 deliveries against Sri Lanka A. This electrifying performance, marked by powerful hitting, shattered the previous world record and showcased the young talent's remarkable prowess on the international stage.

articles.title: Sanjay Leela Bhansali compensates deceased worker’s family with `40 lakh; FWICE seeks stricter safety norms
articles.description: The death of 42-year-old carpenter Chandradhari Yadav on the set of Love & War has reignited concerns over safety standards and exhausting work schedules in the film industry. While producer Sanjay Leela Bhansali’s production house has offered `40 lakh compensation to the worker’s family, film bodies FWICE and FSSAMU are demanding support for his children’s education, regulated working hours, and mandatory safety audits. Union representatives allege Chandradhari had been working continuously for three days and stress that no film or producer can justify compromising workers’ lives and well-being.

articles.title: Ahead of Neet-UG re-exam, Dharmendra Pradhan urges nearly 22 lakh candidates to 'sit fearlessly'
articles.description: As nearly 22 lakh candidates are set to appear for the Neet-UG re-examination, Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan urged students to take the test fearlessly and appealed to the public not to create anxiety around the examination

articles.title: The Most Controversial World Cup Yet? Inside The Storm Surrounding FIFA World Cup 2026
articles.description: From Iran travel disputes and Almiron’s historic red card to soaring ticket prices and FIFA criticism, the 2026 World Cup has been packed with controversy on and off the pitch.

articles.title: Anantapur Temple SHOCKER: Woman Prays for Mother-in-Law's Death on Rs 20 Note
articles.description: A daughter-in-law, fed up with her mother-in-law's harassment, dropped a Rs. 20 note in a temple hundi in Anantapur, asking God to make her die soon. A similar incident had happened in Kalaburagi before, highlighting the harsh reality of some mother-in-law and daughter-in-law relationships.

articles.title: Parl panel to study India's economic conditions amid global uncertainties
articles.description: Parliamentary panels select their subjects soon after they are constituted. But they are at liberty to select additional subjects keeping in mind evolving circumstances

articles.title: Word of the Day: "Godwottery"
articles.description: Godwottery is a rare and fascinating English word used to describe excessive ornamentation or overly elaborate language. Discover its Victorian roots, meaning, pronunciation and examples of how this quirky term is used today.

articles.title: ‘Less anxiety, more presence’: Man shares what happened after weekend digital detox
articles.description: A man shares his experience of a weekend digital detox where he switched off his iPhone and used a Nokia phone.

articles.title: US intelligence report hints Netanyahu might hinder peace talks with Iran
articles.description: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu is reportedly under domestic pressure to continue operations against the Iranian proxy group Hezbollah.

articles.title: Hawkish Fed and a fragile Iran deal leave commodity markets on shaky ground
articles.description: The US PCE price index and a revised Q1 GDP print, alongside several Fed speakers, will be closely watched as stronger-than-expected data would reinforce the Fed's hawkish stance.

articles.title: Chennai Weather LATEST Update: Heavy Rain Alert for 6 Districts, Will Chennai Receive Rain Today?
articles.description: Chennai Weather LATEST Update: Tamil Nadu is set to witness widespread rain activity on June 21, with the weather department issuing a heavy rainfall warning for six districts. Chennai may also experience light to moderate showers during the day

articles.title: ‘Chicken and egg issue’: JD Vance heads to Switzerland for Iran talks, hopes for progress on Lebanon
articles.description: US Vice President JD Vance left Washington Saturday (June 20) on his way to Switzerland for talks with Iran on Sunday (June 21), telling reporters that he hoped to 'make progress on the nuclear issue' and 'the Lebanon ceasefire issue.' 'Despite the headlines, things are actually getting better there (in Lebanon), and things are slowing down a little bit,' Vance said before boarding his plane for Geneva. 'It's going to be something we're just going to have to continuously manage to ensure that you know Israel and Lebanon are both safe and secure.'

articles.title: UP-made BrahMos missiles forced Pakistan to cry for help during Operation Sindoor: Yogi
articles.description: Yogi says SP, Cong divide society, lack vision for development as he launches ₹1,766 crore projects in Lalitpur, addresses meet in Jhansi

articles.title: Germany End 12-Year Wait, Reach Knockout Stage With Dramatic Win Over Ivory Coast
articles.description: Germany End 12-Year Wait, Reach Knockout Stage With Dramatic Win Over Ivory Coast

articles.title: Pakistan PM Sharif, Army Chief Munir leave for Switzerland for Iran-US talks
articles.description: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Army Chief Asim Munir are in Switzerland for crucial technical talks between the US and Iran. These discussions follow an Islamabad MoU and aim to finalize details of a preliminary accord to end the ongoing conflict. The talks, initially postponed, are now underway after a de-escalation agreement between Israel and Hezbollah. Key Iranian officials have also arrived for the high-stakes negotiations.

articles.title: BADB projects across 14 Karnataka districts hit by inadequate fund allocation
articles.description: BADB projects across 14 dists hit by inadequate allocations

articles.title: The New Cost of Capital: Why global monetary shifts matter for India
articles.description: While global liquidity conditions may remain challenging and foreign portfolio flows could stay volatile, India's structural growth drivers remain largely intact.

articles.title: Yoga Day 2026: PM Modi says yoga is an expression of human spirit, not just physical exercise
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi addresses the nation on International Yoga Day 2026 from Kolkata's Red Road, saying yoga is an expression of the human spirit and brings people together worldwide.

articles.title: Plane Crash Middlefield Ohio: Pilot Killed After Single-Engine Plane Goes Down in Geauga County
articles.description: The circumstances surrounding the incident have not yet been released. An investigation is expected to determine the cause of the crash.

articles.title: Police arrest alleged kingpin behind multi-state burglary racket, aide also held
articles.description: Police arrest alleged kingpin behind multi-state burglary racket, aide also held

articles.title: Netherlands Join Brazil & Argentina In Elite List, Become 8th Team In The World To...
articles.description: Netherlands reached 100 FIFA World Cup goals with a 5-1 thrashing of Sweden, becoming the eighth nation to achieve the milestone.

articles.title: One dead, another critical after armed gang chases, shoots rivals in Jodhpur
articles.description: One dead, another critical after armed gang chases, shoots rivals in Jodhpur

articles.title: Four months after trial run, Jaipur gets 29 new e-buses
articles.description: Four months after trial run, Jaipur gets 29 new e-buses

articles.title: UP showcases GCC potential at MachineCon Summit in Goa
articles.description: UP showcases GCC potential at MachineCon Summit in Goa

articles.title: Rebel SP MPs will help NDA on passage of key bills: Rajbhar
articles.description: SBSP chief Om Prakash Rajbhar claims rebel SP MPs may form a separate group to back NDA on key bills; UP deputy CM Keshav Maurya dismisses it.

articles.title: Maximum in a day: 3 Indian-flagged ships safely cross Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: India News: NEW DELHI: Three Indian-flagged tankers - Desh Vaibhav, Desh Vibhor and Sanmar Herald - carrying 8.6 lakh tonne of crude oil, crossed Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Father's Day: 7 Hollywood Actors Whose Children Followed Them Into Showbiz
articles.description: For Father's Day, we revisit these Hollywood celebrities and famous dads have children who have also become actors. Many of them also shared screen space together, while some have played younger versions of their parents.

articles.title: Three-time Olympic canoeist David Hearn denies vandalizing Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool after arrest
articles.description: Former US Olympian David Hearn was arrested near the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, accused of damaging the recently renovated landmark. Hearn, a decorated canoeist, vehemently denies the allegations, stating he only touched a detached piece of liner. The incident occurred just before President Trump publicly condemned vandalism at the site.

articles.title: BTS’ Jungkook’s former classmate reveals why he was bullied in school
articles.description: The anecdote, which recently circulated online, paints a picture of a shy young Jungkook long before he debuted as BTS’ “Golden Maknae.”

articles.title: Maharashtra: 5 tourists drown at Ganpatipule beach in Ratnagiri
articles.description: Five tourists drowned and three were rescued after a group of eight from Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar fell into the sea at Ganpatipule Beach in Maharashtra's Ratnagiri district. The tragedy occurred as they reportedly misjudged sea conditions.

articles.title: Final nail in the coffin for Uddhav Thackeray's party? Amit Shah gives daring statement on Shiv Sena
articles.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah took a swipe at Uddhav Thackeray while addressing a public gathering in Kolhapur on June 20, as political turmoil deepened within Shiv Sena (UBT). Shah's remarks came after six of Shiv Sena (UBT)'s nine Lok Sabha MPs skipped a parliamentary meeting in Delhi and sought recognition as a separate group by writing to Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla. The rebel MPs are expected to formally join the Eknath Shinde-led Shiv Sena, a move that would further strengthen the BJP-led NDA government at the Centre.

articles.title: ₹110 crore disbursed to 1.64 lakh farmers in Annamayya district
articles.description: ₹110 crore disbursed to 1.64 lakh farmers in Annamayya district under the ‘Annadatha Sukhibhava-PM Kisan’ programme.

articles.title: Bengal witnessing new freshness, moving to a brighter future: PM Modi
articles.description: PM Modi, in his first rally in West Bengal after BJP's historic win, said the state is seeing a 'new freshness'. At the 'Paschimbanga Divas' event, he stated that Bengal has broken its shackles and is moving towards a brighter future.

articles.title: Psychology says if you can't sleep until the trash is taken out, it may be your brain seeking closure
articles.description: People who can't sleep until the trash is taken out may be seeking mental closure, routine and a sense of control rather than simply keeping their homes clean.

articles.title: Scientists Discover Unusual Changes In Exploded Stars In Nearby Galaxy
articles.description: The findings were presented at the American Astronomical Society meeting in California.

articles.title: Lebanon says Israel-Hezbollah war toll tops 4,000 after 83 killed on Friday
articles.description: The ministry also raised the toll in Israeli attacks on Friday from 47 to a final toll of 83 martyrs and 141 wounded , most of them in south Lebanon but also in the country's east.

articles.title: RS poll: Cong pins hope on CM for action against ‘betrayal’
articles.description: Jharkhand Rajya Sabha polls: Congress alleges cross-voting, urges CM Hemant Soren to probe “betrayal,” says all 16 MLAs backed Pranav Jha.

articles.title: India beat Afghanistan by nine wickets, sweep ODI series 3-0
articles.description: India beat Afghanistan by nine wickets, sweep ODI series 3-0
